personality: 4 Tactile / Playful structure with 2 Material You / Expressive vibrant accents
personality_one_liner: A vibrant, energetic, and highly interactive experience combining tactile floating cards with Gen-Z dopamine-driven high-contrast accents.

spacing.rule: Generous spacing for tactile elements. Floating cards should have md/lg padding from screen edges.

do's: Top-center filter pill hovering over the swipe stack
Floating action buttons or secondary action pills
dont's: Swipe cards themselves (they should be solid tactile cards with imagery)

screens.name: Home
screens.purpose: Primary swipe interface to discover roommates via Tinder-style cards.

states.empty: Playful illustration showing 'No more matches in your area', with a button to broaden filter.
states.error: Readable text with a prominent retry button.

screens.layout: No page scrolling. Full-screen absolute positioned swipe cards (accounting for safe area and tab bar). Top-center glass filter pill overlay. Bottom of the card image has a dark gradient scrim (0 to 80% opacity) behind the text overlay (Name, Age, Gender, Budget). Floating LIKE/NOPE stamps linked to gesture pan.

screens.name: Matches

states.empty: Empty state graphic stating 'Start swiping to find matches!'

screens.layout: Grid or vertical list of liked profiles and apartments. Use chunky tactile cards with generous padding.

screens.name: Apartments
screens.purpose: List of available apartments in the study city.

states.empty: No apartments found for current filters.

screens.layout: Vertical scroll list. Each apartment card is full-width minus padding, featuring a large cover image, dark gradient scrim, and bold typography for rent/location. Tags for amenities.

screens.name: Profile
screens.purpose: Manage user settings, preferences, and view own roommate card.
screens.layout: Header with user photo, floating edit button. Tactile list rows for settings. Sticky primary CTA at bottom for saving profile changes.

student_portrait_2.alt: Male university student smiling on campus

apartment_interior_1.alt: Warm lit empty apartment living room with tall windows

apartment_interior_2.alt: Modern apartment interior with sectional sofa

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: The Home screen must NOT have vertical scrolling. Use `react-native-reanimated` and `react-native-gesture-handler` for absolute-positioned swipe cards.
SWIPE MECHANICS: Cards must rotate slightly as they are dragged left or right. Map the X-translation to a rotation angle. Link a LIKE and NOPE stamp opacity to the drag distance.
FILTER UI: Place the filter action (Gender, Age range, Budget) inside a floating, glassmorphic pill docked at the top center, sitting z-index above the cards.

CARD UI: Use real portrait images filling the card. A mandatory dark gradient scrim must overlay the bottom 40% of the image (0% to 80% surfaceInverse) to guarantee contrast for the Name, Age, and Budget (€) text.
TAB BAR: Implement a custom bottom tab bar with a glassmorphic background (`expo-blur` / `expo-glass-effect`). Ensure cards respect the bottom safe area without hiding behind it awkwardly.

LEARNINGS FROM RESEARCH: Gen Z apps favor 'Dopamine Maximalism' – chunky typography (Bricolage Grotesque), electric high-contrast accents (Lime Green and Vivid Amber), and highly responsive tactile interactions over plain minimalism.
